$comment: schema_version=1.0.0 | Added 2026-06-03 | Agent Runtime Layer. Breaking changes require engine_version bump + Architect RFC.
title: NOVA 2.5 Agent Lease Store
description: Schema for .task-locks/agents/leases.json. Maintained by lease-manager.mjs. Records all active, released, and expired leases. Never edited manually.

schema_version.description: Semver of this lease store format. Bump on breaking schema changes.

generated_at.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp of the last write by lease-manager.mjs.

leases.description: All lease records (active and historical). Historical leases are retained for audit/reputation use.

lease_id.description: SHA-256(task_id + ':' + agent_id + ':' + acquired_at). Stable identifier for cross-referencing with events.

agent_id.description: Agent holding this lease. Must match a record in registry.json.

role.description: Role the agent is acting in for this lease.

role_category.description: Maps role to the lock slot in registry.json. IMPLEMENTATION/REFACTOR → implementation_lock; REVIEW/ARCHITECT → review_lock.

acquired_at.description: UTC timestamp when the lease was first acquired (TASK_CLAIMED event timestamp).

expires_at.description: UTC timestamp when the lease expires if not renewed. Recomputed on each LEASE_RENEWED event.

last_heartbeat.description: UTC timestamp of the most recent TASK_HEARTBEAT or LEASE_RENEWED event. Used to detect stale leases.

status.description: ACTIVE: lease is current. RELEASED: agent voluntarily released via TASK_RELEASED. EXPIRED: system emitted LEASE_EXPIRED after missed heartbeat.

claim_event_index.description: event_index of the TASK_CLAIMED (or TASK_REFACTOR_REQUESTED) event that opened this lease slot. Used by task_runtime_state claim-bound validation.

bound_snapshot_index.description: For REVIEW/ARCHITECT leases: the snapshot_index this review is bound to. Must satisfy the three-part gate in task_runtime_state.schema.json before review_legal=true. Null for IMPLEMENTATION/REFACTOR leases.

renewal_count.description: Number of times this lease has been renewed via LEASE_RENEWED. Incremented by lease-manager.mjs on each renewal.

released_at.description: UTC timestamp of release (TASK_RELEASED or LEASE_EXPIRED event). Null while ACTIVE.
